pi_items.source: setup_task.sh Python data generation script creates exactly 4 files (2 PNGs and 2 Mock JPEGs) that are appended to the 'evidence.bin' file.
verifier.py uses passed = score >= 70 to determine success.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic raw binary dump (evidence.bin) containing exactly 4 hidden files (2 minimal PNGs and 2 mocked JPEGs) generated dynamically during setup. The project is located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/file_carver. The verifier checks extracted files against expected SHA-256 hashes and requires a score of 70 or higher to pass.
